test.create_query: CREATE TABLE na_src ( i64 Int64, n_i64 Nullable(Int64), n_u32 Nullable(UInt32), b Bool, d Date, dt64 DateTime64(3), dec Decimal64(4), s String, lc LowCardinality(String), arr Array(Int64) ) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO na_src SELECT number, if(number % 3 = 0, NULL, number), if(number % 5 = 0, NULL, toUInt32(number)), number % 2, toDate(number % 40000), toDateTime64(number / 1000, 3), toDecimal64(number % 100000, 4), toString(number % 100000), toString(number % 1000), range(number % 5) FROM numbers(20000000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE na_arrow ENGINE = File(Arrow) AS na_src
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO na_arrow SELECT * FROM na_src
test.query: SELECT * FROM na_src FORMAT Arrow SETTINGS output_format_arrow_use_native_writer = 1, output_format_arrow_compression_method = 'none'
SELECT * FROM na_src FORMAT Arrow SETTINGS output_format_arrow_use_native_writer = 0, output_format_arrow_compression_method = 'none'
SELECT * FROM na_arrow FORMAT Null SETTINGS input_format_arrow_use_native_reader = 1
SELECT * FROM na_arrow FORMAT Null SETTINGS input_format_arrow_use_native_reader = 0
